title: 20 Pack Velvet Coat Hangers – Non Slip Velvet Hangers for Clothes, Space Saving Adult Hangers with Tie Organizer & Swivel Hooks – Clothes Hangers Wardrobe Storage - Black
features: DURABLE NON-SLIP VELVET HANGERS FOR CLOTHES These premium velvet hangers for clothes are designed with a soft, non-slip velvet surface that keeps garments in place without slipping or creasing. Whether you're hanging delicate blouses or heavy winter jackets, these strong coat hangers support up to 5kg, offering a secure hold for all your wardrobe essentials.

SPACE SAVING HANGERS FOR A TIDY CLOSET Transform your closet with these slim, space saving hangers. Each velvet coat hanger measures just 0.6 cm thick, helping you fit more items in limited space while keeping everything neatly arranged. Ideal for small wardrobes, shared spaces, or anyone looking to maximize storage without sacrificing style.

360° SWIVEL HOOK FOR EASY USE Each cloth hanger comes with a 360° swivel hook, making it easy to hang and access clothes from any angle. Whether you're arranging your wardrobe or picking out an outfit, these hooks provide convenience and flexibility. These velvet coat, trousers hangers are practical for everyday use and wardrobe organisation.

PERFECT FOR ADULT CLOTHES – LIGHT OR HEAVY From lightweight tops to bulky outerwear, these coat hangers adult are perfect for handling all garment types. The non-slip velvet texture keeps items firmly in place, while the strong frame supports heavier loads without bending. A must-have for anyone seeking high-quality hangers for clothes.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL VELVET COAT HANGERS WITH SHOULDER GROOVES Designed with shoulder notches for strappy clothing, ties, or accessories, these multi-purpose velvet hangers help keep clothes wrinkle-free and well-shaped. Their sleek design makes them ideal hangers for clothes space savers, offering both function and fashion in one wardrobe-friendly solution.
